seo.title: Wholesale Back Side Lit Channel Letters — EdgeLuxe LP 11-BS | Sunlite Signs
seo.metaDescription: Wholesale partial back side-lit block acrylic channel letters. Flush-mount halo effect from the back side. IP67, German-engineered. Trade pricing for sign shops only.

data.subtitle:
Partial back side illumination creates a subtle, sophisticated glow from behind each flush-mounted letterform. The EdgeLuxe LP 11-BS uses embedded LEDs within 30mm cast block acrylic to project light from the back edges.

German-engineered precision. IP67 sealed. Wholesale direct to sign shops across the USA and Canada.

items.title: Subtle Back Side Glow
items.description: Partial back side illumination creates an elegant, understated halo effect when flush-mounted against any surface.

items.title: Flush-Mount Design
items.description: Engineered for direct surface mounting with no standoff spacers required. Clean, minimal installation profile.

items.title: IP67 Sealed
items.description: Epoxy-sealed block acrylic construction rated IP67. Fully waterproof and dust-proof for any outdoor installation.

items.title: Full Color Range
items.description: Available with any Pantone-matched color. Pigmented translucent acrylics for colored back-glow effects.

items.title: Precision Engineering
items.description: German-engineered to minimum 12mm stroke width with uniform light distribution across every letterform.

items.title: Zero Maintenance
items.description: Epoxy-sealed IP67 construction means no serviceable parts — letters are built to last without any maintenance.

data.heading: Trade Specifications
data.description: Built with IP67 epoxy-sealed block acrylic for zero-maintenance durability. Every specification reflects our commitment to quality and longevity. Available exclusively at wholesale trade pricing.
data.image: Back side lit channel letter — cross-section detail showing LED placement and flush-mount design

data.heading: Common Applications
data.description: Back side lit channel letters deliver a refined, understated aesthetic ideal for premium environments where subtlety and sophistication are paramount. Wholesale direct to sign shops for all project types.
